title: bidens colimana
intro: Bidens colimana, also known as False Dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bidens colimana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
